ResearchProjectDef.label: Herdstones
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the ability to construct herdstones.
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterText: You now have the knowledge to create Herdstones. With Herdstone you can summon Minotaurs by having pawns with the "Herdstone Affinity" gene do ritual work at the Herdstone.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ancestor Core
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the ability to construct Ancestor Cores.
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterText: You now have the technology to create Ancestor Cores. Each pawn with the "Cloneskein" gene can be uploaded into the Ancestor Core, giving Global Learning factor to all other pawns with the "Cloneskein" gene. Additionally crucibles can be linked to the core, allowing for "Kin" to be gestated.
